title: TiDB cannot clean up the stats meta after dropping the database
description:
## Bug Report

TiDB cannot clean up the stats meta after dropping the database.

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
1. Start a TiDB cluser
2. Use the `test` database
3. Create a table and insert some data
```sql
CREATE TABLE test.my_table (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255),
    value INT
);

INSERT INTO test.my_table (id, name, value)
WITH RECURSIVE numbers AS (
    SELECT 1 as n
    UNION ALL
    SELECT n + 1 FROM numbers WHERE n < 1000
)
SELECT
    n as id,
    CONCAT('Name_', n) as name,
    FLOOR(RAND() * 1000) as value
FROM numbers;
```
4. Wait for 10 minutes
5. Drop the database.
6. Wait for another 20 minutes, and check the stats meta.

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

The stats meta is correctly deleted.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

It is still there.

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

all the versions

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test.another_table (id Int32 NOT NULL, description String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now(), value Decimal(10, 2) CHECK(value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test.another_table (id, description, value) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry', 99.99);
CREATE TABLE test.join_table (id Int32, another_id Int32, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO test.join_table (id, another_id) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT a.id, a.description, j.id AS join_id FROM test.another_table a LEFT JOIN test.join_table j ON a.id = j.another_id WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Dropping the database does not clean up stats meta
